title: Cost/yield rollup: per-task cost x outcome view
description: Source-mining audit item #3 (codeburn pattern, TASK-171 Priority 2, zero follow-on so far): per-task cost-proxy x outcome rollup joining events.jsonl volumes and map.db lifecycle spans, classifying RELEASED / approved-not-released / RETIRED / abandoned, with productive-vs-abandoned spend split. Proxies labeled as proxies, no invented dollar figures. Work packet: MAP_System/inbox/helpers/cost-yield-rollup-packet.md; reference vocabulary repo/codeburn-main/src/yield.ts.
acceptance_criteria: Rollup joins per-task event volume, lifecycle spans, attempts, and rework rounds with task outcome class; text and --json outputs match map_metrics.py conventions.
Cost signals are explicitly labeled proxies; no fabricated currency figures.
Read-only against canonical state; focused fixture tests wired into run_tests.sh; suite green.
Real rollup output over the actual repo included in the report artifact.
